lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello mate. What are you up to now?

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Erm, I'm a bit busy at the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooooh, I bet you're travelling across the seas. Or maybe you're visiting the world leaders?

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Well, I'm trying to fight TzTok-Jad at the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He must be really tough!

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Yes, he's level 702 in Combat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enjoy!

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Thanks. Arghhhh, death to you foul beast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Oh, hi.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What adventure are you now on?

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Well, I just dispatched TzTok-Jad. Pretty tough! I'm now on my way to the desert. I'm going to see if I can hunt down this Kalphite Queen everyone's been telling me about.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I should warn you, you'll need a team to take that beast on.

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: I've already thought of that. I've arranged for a couple of the Slayer masters to join me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow! I wish I could witness that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again!

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: That's funny, I was just talking about you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You were?

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Yes, I've been arranging a meeting between various leaders of Gielinor to discuss some political issues. It seems you have certainly been around a bit!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose I have. What issues are you going to be discussing in this meeting? Who will be there?

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Sorry, that's top secret information.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine, I understand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there, where are you now?

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Well, I thought I'd try out this place called the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear.

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Quite a gloomy place.

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Oh! I can see someone.

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: He seems to be coming this way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Be careful!

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Yes, he's definitely looking at me.

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: He's wearing some impressive armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Watch out! He's going to attack you!

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Surely not. Oh, look, there's another two of them coming to meet me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're in a clan, they're going to fight you!

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: I don't think so.

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Hi there gentlemen! Nice day...

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Woah, take it easy! Hey, stop that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fight Cyrisus!

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: I'll teach you to hit me! Have this!

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: That'll teach them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You beat them?

lines.speaker: Cyrisus
lines.text: Of course. Easy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Phew!
